title: Four Reasons to Skip St. Barts and Head to St. Martin
title_cn: 避开圣巴特，前往圣马丁的四个理由

paragraphs.en: When temperatures hit freezing, the northern jet set reliably migrates to St. Barts, a little slice of France in the Caribbean. Once there, they swarm the island’s beach clubs, gourmet restaurants and luxury hotels, often paying astronomical prices for the privilege to do so. For a similar Franco-Caribbean vacation that doesn’t cost a year of college tuition, consider a trip to the French side of nearby St. Martin, the smallest landmass in the world shared by two sovereign nations: France and the Netherlands.
paragraphs.cn: 当气温降至冰点时，北方的富豪阶层便会可靠地迁徙到加勒比海的法国小岛圣巴特。一旦抵达，他们便蜂拥至岛上的海滩俱乐部、美食餐厅和豪华酒店，通常为享受这些特权支付天文数字般的价格。若想体验类似的法属加勒比假期，且无需支付一年大学学费的费用，不妨考虑前往附近的圣马丁岛的法属部分，这是世界上最小的由两个主权国家（法国和荷兰）共享的陆块。

paragraphs.en: A number of cities, including New York, Chicago and Charlotte, offer nonstop flights to St. Martin, where you’ll find ample European glamour, miles of swimmable beaches and a deep bench of restaurants. Here, four reasons to look beyond Barthélemy this winter.
paragraphs.cn: 包括纽约、芝加哥和夏洛特在内的多个城市提供直飞圣马丁的航班，在那里您会发现充足的欧洲魅力、数英里可游泳的海滩以及众多餐厅。今年冬天，有四个理由让您将目光投向圣巴特以外的地方。

paragraphs.en: On St. Barts, getting a dinner reservations at, say, Bonito or Tamarin, often requires calling weeks, or even months, in advance. In St. Martin, even during high season, you can book most places a day or two ahead of time, often by calling the restaurant directly instead of relying on well-connected friends or hotel concierges.
paragraphs.cn: 在圣巴特，要想在Bonito或Tamarin等餐厅预订晚餐，通常需要提前数周甚至数月打电话。而在圣马丁，即使在旺季，您也可以提前一两天预订大多数地方，通常是直接致电餐厅，而不是依赖人脉广的朋友或酒店礼宾员。

paragraphs.en: For inventive Franco-Caribbean cuisine, try Alizé, which opened in 2024 in the Marina Royale with a menu that includes a coconut-lobster cocktail and tempura brie. For traditional French fare, head to La Cigale (think: foie gras de canard and sole meunière). And for that exclusive beachfront feel that draws the billionaires to St. Barts, try La Spiaggia inside La Samanna hotel, where the Capri salad and spaghetti vongole easily stand up to anything in Italy.
paragraphs.cn: 若想品尝富有创意的法属加勒比菜肴，可以尝试Alizé，该餐厅于2024年在Marina Royale开业，菜单包括椰子龙虾鸡尾酒和天妇罗布里干酪。若想品尝传统法式美食，请前往La Cigale（例如：鸭肝酱和香煎比目鱼）。而对于吸引亿万富翁前往圣巴特的专属海滨体验，可以尝试La Samanna酒店内的La Spiaggia餐厅，那里的卡普里沙拉和蛤蜊意面可以轻松媲美意大利的任何美食。

paragraphs.en: Instead of a disco lunch at St. Barts’s Nikki Beach, which can easily creep into five figures (if you can even get in), try the elegant Beach House at Anse Marcel Beach Resort. The rosé flows, club music plays at tolerable volumes and you won’t find any conga lines or overserved patrons dancing on tables for Instagram likes. A midday meal for two (a duck burger and a Caesar salad, for example) will set you back about $120—slightly more if you opt for a side of generously portioned lobster for the very reasonable price of around $9.
paragraphs.cn: 与其在圣巴特的Nikki Beach享用可能轻松达到五位数（如果您能进去的话）的迪斯科午餐，不如尝试Anse Marcel Beach Resort优雅的Beach House餐厅。这里玫瑰酒畅饮，俱乐部音乐音量适中，您不会看到任何康加舞队或饮酒过度的顾客在桌子上跳舞以获取Instagram点赞。两人份的午餐（例如，一份鸭肉汉堡和一份凯撒沙拉）大约花费120美元——如果您选择一份份量充足的龙虾配菜，价格约为9美元，则会略高一些。

paragraphs.en: Like the very exclusive Cheval Blanc on St. Barts, the Belmond hotel La Samanna is owned by the luxury conglomerate LVMH. Rates fluctuate throughout the year, but in a recent search for dates in March, rooms at La Samanna, on the secluded, crescent-shaped beach of Baie Longue, could be found for around $1,640 and up. It was much more difficult to find nights available at Cheval Blanc, with scant options starting at $5,000 and some weeks requiring a four-night minimum.
paragraphs.cn: 与圣巴特极其独特的白马庄园（Cheval Blanc）一样，贝尔蒙德酒店La Samanna也由奢侈品集团LVMH所有。价格全年波动，但在最近一次搜索三月份的日期时，位于Baie Longue僻静新月形海滩上的La Samanna酒店的房间价格约为1,640美元起。而白马庄园则很难找到可用的夜晚，选择稀少，起价5,000美元，有些周甚至要求至少入住四晚。

paragraphs.en: Unlike Cheval Blanc, which sits on the rougher Atlantic, La Samanna is great for families because of its calm, swimmable beach facing the Caribbean. Other bonuses: a fine dining restaurant, L’Oursin, and a menu of out-of-the-box wellness offerings, such as Kundalini meditation and Reiki.
paragraphs.cn: 与坐落在更汹涌的大西洋一侧的白马庄园不同，La Samanna酒店非常适合家庭入住，因为它拥有面向加勒比海的平静、可游泳的海滩。其他额外福利包括：一家高级餐厅L’Oursin，以及一系列创新健康服务，如昆达里尼冥想和灵气疗法。

paragraphs.en: Gustavia, the capital of St. Barts, may be known for showrooms filled with extravagantly priced brand-name goods. But Marigot, its counterpart on St. Martin, is home to independent boutiques selling lesser-known, smaller labels.
paragraphs.cn: 圣巴特的首都古斯塔维亚（Gustavia）可能以其充满价格昂贵的品牌商品的展厅而闻名。但圣马丁的对应城市马里戈特（Marigot）则拥有销售鲜为人知的小众品牌的独立精品店。

paragraphs.en: Gipsy James, a multi-brand women’s shop carries everything from Van Palma, the made-in-France hat label, to the popular Parisian line Vanessa Bruno. Around the corner, Billie, on Rue de Général de Gaulle, specializes in well-priced toys and stylish children’s clothes, like from the Danish line Konges Sløjd. Those more interested in baked goods than baby blankets will want to head straight for the Framboisier fruit tart at Chez Fernand, located across from the Marigot waterfront.
paragraphs.cn: Gipsy James是一家多品牌女装店，销售从法国制造的帽子品牌Van Palma到热门巴黎品牌Vanessa Bruno的各种商品。在街角，位于戴高乐将军街（Rue de Général de Gaulle）的Billie专门销售价格合理的玩具和时尚童装，例如丹麦品牌Konges Sløjd的产品。那些对烘焙食品比婴儿毯更感兴趣的人，则会想直接前往位于马里戈特海滨对面的Chez Fernand品尝Framboisier水果挞。

paragraphs.en: Appeared in the January 31, 2026, print edition as 'One Little Reason to Skip St. Barts'.
paragraphs.cn: 刊登于2026年1月31日印刷版，标题为“一个避开圣巴特的小理由”。

vocabulary.meaning_en: (of an animal, bird, or fish) move from one region or habitat to another according to the seasons. (In this context, people moving for vacation).
vocabulary.example: When temperatures hit freezing, the northern jet set reliably migrates to St. Barts, a little slice of France in the Caribbean.
vocabulary.example_cn: 当气温降至冰点时，北方的富豪阶层便会可靠地迁徙到加勒比海的法国小岛圣巴特。

vocabulary.meaning_en: (of a price or amount) extremely large.
vocabulary.example: Once there, they swarm the island’s beach clubs, gourmet restaurants and luxury hotels, often paying astronomical prices for the privilege to do so.
vocabulary.example_cn: 一旦抵达，他们便蜂拥至岛上的海滩俱乐部、美食餐厅和豪华酒店，通常为享受这些特权支付天文数字般的价格。

vocabulary.meaning_en: a special right, advantage, or immunity granted or available only to a particular person or group.
vocabulary.example: Once there, they swarm the island’s beach clubs, gourmet restaurants and luxury hotels, often paying astronomical prices for the privilege to do so.
vocabulary.example_cn: 一旦抵达，他们便蜂拥至岛上的海滩俱乐部、美食餐厅和豪华酒店，通常为享受这些特权支付天文数字般的价格。

vocabulary.meaning_en: enough or more than enough; plentiful.
vocabulary.example: A number of cities, including New York, Chicago and Charlotte, offer nonstop flights to St. Martin, where you’ll find ample European glamour, miles of swimmable beaches and a deep bench of restaurants.
vocabulary.example_cn: 包括纽约、芝加哥和夏洛特在内的多个城市提供直飞圣马丁的航班，在那里您会发现充足的欧洲魅力、数英里可游泳的海滩以及众多餐厅。

vocabulary.meaning_en: an arrangement to have something (e.g., a room, a table, or a seat) held for one's use at a later time.
vocabulary.example: On St. Barts, getting a dinner reservations at, say, Bonito or Tamarin, often requires calling weeks, or even months, in advance.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在圣巴特，要想在Bonito或Tamarin等餐厅预订晚餐，通常需要提前数周甚至数月打电话。

vocabulary.meaning_en: (in a hotel) an employee who assists guests, for example by booking tours or making restaurant reservations.
vocabulary.example: In St. Martin, even during high season, you can book most places a day or two ahead of time, often by calling the restaurant directly instead of relying on well-connected friends or hotel concierges.
vocabulary.example_cn: 在圣马丁，即使在旺季，您也可以提前一两天预订大多数地方，通常是直接致电餐厅，而不是依赖人脉广的朋友或酒店礼宾员。

vocabulary.meaning_en: a style or method of cooking, especially as characteristic of a particular country or region.
vocabulary.example: For inventive Franco-Caribbean cuisine, try Alizé, which opened in 2024 in the Marina Royale with a menu that includes a coconut-lobster cocktail and tempura brie.
vocabulary.example_cn: 若想品尝富有创意的法属加勒比菜肴，可以尝试Alizé，该餐厅于2024年在Marina Royale开业，菜单包括椰子龙虾鸡尾酒和天妇罗布里干酪。

vocabulary.meaning_en: pleasingly graceful and stylish in appearance or manner.
vocabulary.example: Instead of a disco lunch at St. Barts’s Nikki Beach, which can easily creep into five figures (if you can even get in), try the elegant Beach House at Anse Marcel Beach Resort.
vocabulary.example_cn: 与其在圣巴特的Nikki Beach享用可能轻松达到五位数（如果您能进去的话）的迪斯科午餐，不如尝试Anse Marcel Beach Resort优雅的Beach House餐厅。

vocabulary.meaning_en: rise and fall irregularly in number or amount.
vocabulary.example: Rates fluctuate throughout the year, but in a recent search for dates in March, rooms at La Samanna, on the secluded, crescent-shaped beach of Baie Longue, could be found for around $1,640 and up.
vocabulary.example_cn: 价格全年波动，但在最近一次搜索三月份的日期时，位于Baie Longue僻静新月形海滩上的La Samanna酒店的房间价格约为1,640美元起。

vocabulary.meaning_en: a person or thing holding a similar position or performing a similar function to another in a different place.
vocabulary.example: But Marigot, its counterpart on St. Martin, is home to independent boutiques selling lesser-known, smaller labels.
vocabulary.example_cn: 但圣马丁的对应城市马里戈特（Marigot）则拥有销售鲜为人知的小众品牌的独立精品店。
